name: Revised rate confirmation from broker (typosquat)
subject: REVISED rate-con #RC-2241885 — please acknowledge
trucking_context: Brokers routinely email revised rate confirmations as PDF attachments or links; a typosquat domain (chr0binson.com vs chrobinson.com) is the canonical broker-impersonation pattern that has hit carrier offices for years.
indicators: From-domain chr0binson.com substitutes a zero for the letter 'o'
Real rate-cons are typically attached PDFs, not portal-login links
No prior thread or reference to an existing rate-con
Threat of re-tendering pressures the dispatcher to act before verifying
